BAGEP Awards KHAS Young Scientists

The Science Academy Young Scientists Award Program (BAGEP) 2020-2021 Award Ceremony, initiated by the Science Academy and carried out with financial support from the society instead of public funds, was held on September 16, 2021 at the Istanbul Planning Center Florya Campus.

3 young academics from Kadir Has University received their awards from the hands of Prof. Dr. Sondan Durukanoğlu Feyiz, the rector of our university. Our award-winning academicians and their departments:

– Prof. Dr. Deniz EROĞLU, Molecular Biology and Genetics

– Prof. Dr. Emre Ozan POLAT, Mechatronics Engineering

– Assoc. Prof. Onurcan YILMAZ, Psychology

The Academy of Science Young Scientists Award Program (BAGEP), which is carried out entirely with the support of civil society and donations from individuals and institutions without public funding, rewards promising young academics with a prestigious scholarship to support their research. Within the scope of the BAGEP Award, young scientists receive 20,000 TL per year for two years.

Please click for the details of BAGEP 2020-2021 Award Ceremony.
